Support.title: Need help?
Support.subtitle: Send us a message and the team will get back to you within 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Describe your question in detail so we can help faster.

success.title: Message received
success.message: Thank you. We've logged your request and a team member will reply within 24 hours.

Support.genericError: Your message couldn't be sent. Please try again in a moment.

GdprConsent.requiredError: You must accept the privacy policy to send your message.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.intro: We respect your privacy and are committed to handling your personal data responsibly. This summary describes what we collect when you contact us through Academy support and how we use it.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.body: When you submit a support form we record your name, email address, the topic you selected, and the message you write. We also store the URL of the page you submitted from so a member of our team can return to your context.

use.title: How we use it
use.body: We use your information solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

retention.title: How long we keep it
retention.body: Support inquiries are retained for as long as the relationship is active and for up to two years thereafter for service-quality and audit reasons.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can request a copy of the data we hold about you, ask us to correct it, or request deletion at any time. Email us and we will respond within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For any privacy-related question, contact contact@transylvaniagrandestate.ro.

Preview.bannerSubtitle: Admin preview — content is rendered with pending drafts. Students don't see this view.
Preview.missingToken: This page needs a preview token. Generate a fresh link from the lesson edit page.
Preview.expired: Preview token expired. Generate a fresh one from the admin lesson editor.
Preview.notFound: Lesson not found, or token doesn't authorize this lesson.
Preview.genericFailure: Something went wrong loading the preview.

brand.headline: Sharper agents close better deals.
brand.feature1Description: Bite-sized lessons you fit between viewings.
brand.feature2Description: Pricing, paperwork, neighborhoods — practical and local.
brand.feature3Description: See what you've learned and earn certificates as you go.

login.title: Sign in
login.resetSuccess: Your password has been reset. Sign in now.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Unlock every TGE Academy course — free, in minutes.
register.sentBody: If {email} isn’t already registered, we’ve sent a verification link. Click it to activate your account.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.expiredBody: This verification link has expired or been used already. Request a new one.
verifyEmail.invalidBody: We couldn’t verify that link. It may have been used already or typed incorrectly.

resendVerification.title: Resend verification
resendVerification.intro: Enter your email. If an unverified account exists, we’ll send a fresh link.
resendVerification.sent: If an unverified account exists with that email, we’ve sent a fresh link.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email. We’ll send you a link to choose a new password.
forgotPassword.sent: If an account exists with that email, we’ve sent you a reset link. Check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.intro: Enter your new password (at least 12 characters).
resetPassword.invalid: This link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.

acceptInvite.title: Accept invitation
acceptInvite.subtitle: Set up your account to start the course
acceptInvite.invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired

dashboard.title: Your courses
dashboard.empty: You don't have access to any courses yet. Contact your administrator.
dashboard.emptyIntro: You're not enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.unenrollConfirm: Remove “{title}” from your list? The course stays available in the catalog.

catalog.title: Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Public courses open to anyone with an Academy account. No separate enrollment needed.
catalog.empty: No public courses are available right now. Check back soon.

course.enrollFailed: Enrollment failed. Please try again in a moment.
course.lessonsEmpty: This course has no lessons yet.

lesson.translationPending: This lesson hasn't been translated into your preferred language yet — showing it in the original language.

account.title: My account
account.verificationBody: You still need to confirm your email address. Didn’t get the link?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
